info.title: IoT Connectivity Management Platform API
info.description: Core API for managing IoT SIM lifecycles, billing, and real-time connectivity diagnostics. Designed for MNOs, MVNOs, and Enterprise customers.

tags.name: SIMs
tags.description: SIM search, details, plans, and subscriptions

parameters.description: Filter by versions with effectiveFrom >= the given time

parameters.description: Filter by versions with effectiveFrom <= the given time

parameters.name: mccmnc
parameters.description: Filter by combined MCC+MNC (5 or 6 digits)

parameters.name: carrierName
parameters.description: Filter by carrier exact name (case sensitive)
